name: Basic White Bread for Zojirushi
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure milk, butter, sugar, salt, and flour into the baking pan.
2. Sprinkle yeast in the center of the flour.
3. Insert the pan securely into the baking unit and close the lid.
4. Select BASIC WHITE BREAD setting if using active dry yeast, or QUICK BAKING setting if using fast-rise yeast.
5. Select MEDIUM baking temperature setting.
6. Press START.
7. The COMPLETE light will flash when bread is done.
8. Using hotpads, remove pan from the unit and pull out the kneading rod.
9. Turn the bread out onto a cooling rack and cool before slicing.
